chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special FERA 922 of 2017 Special FERA 923 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of reference. 18.09.2025 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. These reference applications are pending since 2017 and remain listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Even today time is sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. In view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
